front.title: An old bronze dagger
front.description:
Tinged green, but sharp and sturdy. In the chaotic days after the Makers fell, it was the weapon of a desperate father. He killed his own brother with it, to protect his children’s food. He killed others, too, to make sure his family had enough. So many, many others.

*An artifact of the wider world — see @UUID[Compendium.stonetop.wider-world-and-other-wonders.JournalEntry.Qir4rs4BUipTSyFQ]{Barrow Builders}.*

back.title: An old bronze dagger
back.description:
The dagger holds a shard of that father’s desperate will. When you **_Seek Insight_** **_about someone while carrying the dagger_**, add the following to the list of questions you can ask. If **_your hand is on the hilt_**, you can ask one of these questions for free, even on a 6-.

- What of mine do they most want?
- How am I most vulnerable to them?
- What do they carry that is useful to me?

If a PC keeps the dagger, treat it as a threat (a *MacGuffin*; **Instinct** to cause paranoia).

*An artifact of the wider world — see @UUID[Compendium.stonetop.wider-world-and-other-wonders.JournalEntry.Qir4rs4BUipTSyFQ]{Barrow Builders}.*
